Line input handling, JerryScript integration, console/log implementations, build configuration, and Makefiles for Zephyr.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Line input handling, JerryScript integration, console/log implementations, and build configuration for Zephyr.

## Files
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building the JerryScript target on Zephyr with configuration options and paths.
- **[Makefile.zephyr](Makefile.md.zephyr)**: Makefile for building and configuring JerryScript and Zephyr targets for various boards.
- **[prj.conf](prj.conf.md)**: Configuration settings for Zephyr target in the JerryScript project, enabling console and libc features.
- **[prj.mdef](prj.mdef.md)**: Defines a JerryScript sample application task configuration for Zephyr.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for integrating and building JerryScript with Zephyr RTOS on supported boards.
